content: https://gcc.gnu.org/pipermail/gcc/2022-July/239057.html rust frontend has been approved by the GCC steering committee. this should be good for medium-term kernel support
Great! Very glad to see that (even as a non-default language, I am sure it will help :) I will include the news in the next cover letter, thanks @Alex Gaynor!
Congratulations to Philip & @Arthur Cohen for all their work!
